# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch snapshot repository configuration
PUT /_snapshot/backup-repository
{
  "type": "s3",
  "settings": {
    "bucket": "your-s3-bucket-name",
    "region": "your-region",
    "access_key": "your-access-key-id",
    "secret_key": "your-secret-access-key"
  }
}

# Snapshot creation
PUT /_snapshot/backup-repository/snapshot-1?wait_for_completion=true
{
  "indices": "index_name",  # Replace with your index name or use "_all" for all indices
  "ignore_unavailable": true,
  "include_global_state": false
}

# Snapshot restoration
POST /_snapshot/backup-repository/snapshot-1/_restore
{
  "indices": "index_name",  # Replace with your index name or use "_all" for all indices
  "rename_pattern": "(.+)",
  "rename_replacement": "restored_$1",
  "include_global_state": false
}
